_comment: Frozen press-release snippets for ABA-66 Task 12 goldens. Each row is the minimal text excerpt the per-ticker regex needs — extracted from real 8-K Ex 99.1 filings (accessions noted) and committed permanently so the goldens stay reproducible without re-fetching SEC. Adding a row bumps no schema; deletion or value change requires a Linear note.
